Alright, for the final way out, first of all, this is something that should be scheduled day one. They should know exactly when it's happening, what's gonna happen, where they're gonna be, et cetera. I would definitely make a point to have lots of confirmations on this, because some people, if they have not committed at the week three, may not wanna come in for this. You need to confirm and create some sort of incentive for them to come. Hey, you gotta come see your results, kinda see this, get excited for her in body, whatever it is, but make sure that there's excitement to get in. Now, if they've already committed to the 12 month agreement, and they're doing the weekly payments, this is where the year of change comes in, and you can absolutely pitch this. And if you can get a year of change after 28 days, you are doing really, really high ROI, which is amazing. But this is also your chance to last chance anyone that didn't sign up at week three. Maybe they had some questions, follow up. These are things that you wanna address and make sure that are all ready for as they come in for this final weigh in. At this point, you also wanna talk about their next steps and what you're gonna transition them into, and give them a future path going forward. Again, see the modules in the other sections on this 42 day and the six weeks on how to do the final weigh in as far as procedures, measurements, all those things. Nothing really changes. The only idea is this is a much shorter timeframe, and so you really want to spend the time contacting them, laying the groundwork before they walk in for that final weigh in.
